name: Rich McCormick
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $364,606 for Rich McCormick in U.S. House, GA-06. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
